variants.title: D154G25B
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec D154G25B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D154G25B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 20µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 22µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.2 mm, Length: 140.0 mm, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Seal: Nitrile
